title: Quality Engineer (Tester)
description:
Job Summary
A global leader in technology consulting and digital transformation, the client delivers innovative solutions that enhance business performance and resilience. With deep expertise in cloud computing, data analytics, and AI-driven insights, they help organizations modernize systems, improve scalability, and accelerate operational efficiency. Their end-to-end approach to enterprise transformation empowers companies across industries to innovate with confidence and stay competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape. Our client is looking for a Quality Engineer (Tester).



Main Responsibilities

  • Design, develop, and maintain robust automation test scripts using Playwright
  • Build and enhance automation frameworks aligned with project requirements and best practices
  • Actively participate in Agile ceremonies such as sprint planning, daily stand-ups, reviews, and retrospectives
  • Collaborate with product owners, developers, and stakeholders to understand requirements and user stories
  • Perform requirement analysis and contribute to test strategy and automation approach
  • Provide regular updates and effectively manage client and stakeholder expectations
  • Work closely with cross-functional teams in a fast-paced delivery environment
  • Ensure automation coverage, stability, and continuous improvement of test assets

Qualifications and Profile

  • 5+ years of hands-on experience with automation tools such as Playwright
  • Strong experience in designing and implementing automation frameworks
  • Good understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies
  • Proven ability in client and stakeholder management
  • Strong experience in requirements gathering, analysis, and user story understanding
  • Excellent communication and collaboration skills
  • Ability to adapt and thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic environment


Next Step

  • If interested, you can click on “Apply here” or write an e-mail to dimple.jain@adecco.com with your updated resume.
  • NOTE: - Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted back.

Dimple Jain
EA LIcence No. 91C2918
Personnel Registration No. R22107270

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
